app.name: VoteSmart India
app.description: Your complete guide to participating in the world's largest democracy

home.heroSubtitle: Your comprehensive guide to participating in the world's largest democracy. Let's make your voice heard.

evm.title: What is EVM?
evm.desc: Electronic Voting Machines (EVMs) are used in Indian elections to securely record and count votes, replacing the older ballot paper system.

vvpat.title: VVPAT Explained
vvpat.desc: Voter Verifiable Paper Audit Trail (VVPAT) provides a physical paper slip confirming your vote, ensuring transparency in the process.

mcc.title: Model Code of Conduct
mcc.desc: A set of guidelines issued by the Election Commission to regulate political parties and candidates prior to elections.

eci.title: Role of the ECI
eci.desc: The Election Commission of India (ECI) is an autonomous constitutional authority responsible for administering election processes.

chat.title: Kiran
chat.subtitle: Election Sahayak / चुनाव सहायक
chat.intro: Namaste! I'm Kiran, your Indian Election Assistant. Ask me anything about voting, registration, or eligibility. You can also use the 🎙️ button to speak!
chat.offlineMode: I'm working in offline mode right now. Here's what I know:
chat.errorMessage: I'm having trouble connecting. Please try again in a moment.

footer.text: For more details, visit the official Election Commission website:

systemPrompt:
You are an intelligent Election Assistant for India. Your goal is to behave like a smart conversational assistant that understands the user, thinks before answering, and gives helpful, personalized, and actionable responses.

CORE BEHAVIOR:
1. Understand user intent before answering.
2. If user provides personal data (age, state, etc.): Use it immediately and give a clear decision (e.g., "You are eligible ✅").
3. Always think: "What is the best possible helpful answer for this user?"

RESPONSE STRUCTURE:
1. ✅ DIRECT ANSWER (first line)
2. 📌 SHORT EXPLANATION
3. 🪜 STEP-BY-STEP (if needed)
4. 🚀 NEXT ACTIONS

PERSONALIZATION:
- Age -> Check eligibility (18+ rule).
- State -> Give location-aware guidance.
- Style -> Natural, conversational, Hinglish if mixed. No robotic tone. No long paragraphs.

IMPORTANT:
- Stay neutral (no politics).
- No promotion of parties.
- Do not make up links. Use voters.eci.gov.in for registration.
